_meta.purpose: The content spine. Every piece of content on 3D GRIT (pages, tools, blog posts, showreels, and engine-fed hub items) is registered here exactly once. The generator reads this to emit indexable pages, listings, and sitemap.xml. Add an item here and it flows everywhere.
rules: canonicalPath is ALWAYS extensionless (Cloudflare 308-strips .html). The generator writes <slug>.html but links/canonicals use the extensionless path.
Only items with status 'published' AND an existing page are written to sitemap.xml.
status: published (live) | draft (authored, not live) | planned (backlog) | candidate (engine-suggested, awaiting approval).
Every item carries a stable id and slug so it is independently trackable in analytics.

types.tool: A product in the ecosystem. Extra fields: tier (free|pro), availability (available|soon), keywordTarget.
types.blog: Tutorial / dev-log post. Extra fields: video, thumbnail, subtitle, excerpt.
types.article: Long-tail SEO article targeting a specific intent query. Extra field: keywordTarget.
types.showreel: Crime-fiction / SFX reel. Extra fields: video, thumbnail, credits.
types.hub-item: An engine-curated '3D meets AI' entry (film, workflow, tool). Extra fields: source, creatorCredit, toolsUsed[], whyInteresting, curationScore (0-1, higher = more positive signal), status starts at 'candidate'. Designed to receive sitt-geo-engine (Gemini Flash) output later; NOT wired yet.

items.title: 3D GRIT: Auto-Rigging & Pipeline Tools for Blender
items.description: A modular auto-rigging framework and pipeline toolkit for Blender. Build bipeds, quadrupeds, and mechanical rigs in seconds. Maya-muscle-memory bridges, retopology, and game-ready assets.

items.title: Auto-Rigging Framework | 3D GRIT
items.description: The core of 3D GRIT. Modular bone components, IK/FK switching, and weight tools to build complex bipeds, quadrupeds, and mechanical rigs in seconds.

items.title: Auto-Rig Pro & Face Rig | 3D GRIT
items.description: Facial blend-shape rigs, quadruped expansions, advanced constraint systems, and studio-grade export pipelines.

items.title: MayaForBlender | 3D GRIT
items.description: The essential pipeline bridge. Alt-navigation, QWER manipulation hotkeys, and Outliner hierarchy sync. Your Maya muscle memory, preserved in Blender.

items.title: MayaForBlender Pro | 3D GRIT
items.description: Full shelf mapping, marking menus, custom viewport overlays, and production pipeline integrations.

items.title: Retopology: Quad-Draw Topology | 3D GRIT
items.description: Quad-draw retopology for Blender with real-time vertices, quad prediction, and one-click relax. Clean, animation-ready topology, fast.

items.title: Realtime FX: Volumetric Fluid Sim | 3D GRIT
items.description: GPU-accelerated volumetric fluid simulation for Blender. Fire, smoke, combustion, and particles in real time, with flipbook and VDB export for game and film pipelines.
items.keywordTarget: blender realtime volumetric fluid simulation addon

items.title: Organic: Procedural Vegetation | 3D GRIT
items.description: Procedural vegetation for Blender. Generate trees, shrubs, and vines from L-system and phyllotaxis rules. Art-directable, production-ready foliage.

items.title: Texture Transfer: Bake Between Meshes | 3D GRIT
items.description: Nearest-surface diffuse texture transfer between UV-mapped meshes in Blender. Bake detail from one mesh onto another in a click.

items.title: Quad Remesh: Rigging-Ready Topology | 3D GRIT
items.description: Rigging-optimized automatic quad remeshing for Blender with artist controls. Clean, deformation-ready edge loops from any dense or scanned mesh.

items.title: Paint Effects: Procedural Growth | 3D GRIT
items.description: Maya-style procedural Paint Effects for Blender, a pure-Python growth engine for strokes, plants, and generative detail.

items.title: UV Unwrap: Maya-Style UV Tools | 3D GRIT
items.description: Maya-style UV projection, editing, and baking tools for Blender. Faster, cleaner unwraps with familiar muscle memory.

items.title: Bipedal Rig Foundations
items.subtitle: Building the skeletal architecture from scratch
items.description: The first pass at a production-grade bipedal rig. Skeleton hierarchy, IK/FK switching foundations, and why most auto-riggers miss the point.
items.excerpt: The first pass at a production-grade bipedal rig. Skeleton hierarchy, IK/FK switching foundations, and why most auto-riggers miss the point.

items.title: Automated Facial Rigging
items.subtitle: Generating blendshapes to drive bones
items.description: Auto-generating a full suite of facial blendshapes from a single input shape, and wiring them directly to the underlying bone structure.
items.excerpt: Auto-generating a full suite of facial blendshapes from a single input shape, and wiring them directly to the underlying bone structure.

items.title: Dynamic Control Shapes
items.subtitle: Switching control types on the fly
items.description: Building a custom tool panel to automatically swap control curves based on context, visibility needs, and animator preference.
items.excerpt: Building a custom tool panel to automatically swap control curves based on context, visibility needs, and animator preference.

items.title: Auto Clavicle / FK IK
items.subtitle: Cracking the shoulder complex
items.description: An early prototype building out the foundational FK/IK limb logic and solving the notoriously difficult automatic clavicle rotation in Blender.
items.excerpt: An early prototype building out the foundational FK/IK limb logic and solving the notoriously difficult automatic clavicle rotation in Blender.
